form.name: Name
form.addressPlaceholder: Search on Google Maps: e.g. Piazza Venezia, Rome
form.addressHint: Type at least 3 characters and select a result to set the coordinates.
form.enforceRadiusHint: If disabled: GPS is still recorded on the stamp, but without distance checking. The branch must be selected manually by the user (no auto-detect).
form.previewEmpty: Select an address to view the branch on the map.
